name: WLF_POPULAR_LI_DN
description: This table stores the details of learning assignment completions in weekly increments in a given popularity category.

columns.Name: CATEGORY_ID
columns.Comments: Spcifies the identifier of the popularity category

columns.Name: CATEGORY_CODE
columns.Comments: Specifies the popularity category of the learning item

columns.Name: LEARNING_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: Specifies identifier of the learning item

columns.Name: LEARNING_ITEM_TYPE
columns.Comments: Specifies the learning item type (e.g., Course, Specialization, Community, etc.,)

columns.Name: LEARNING_ITEM_SUB_TYPE
columns.Comments: Specifies the learning item sub type for the learning item type like Community (e.g., Topic Community, Category Community, etc.,)

columns.Name: LEARNING_ITEM_NAME
columns.Comments: Specifies name of the learning item in US language

columns.Name: METRIC_DATE
columns.Comments: Specifies the effective date of the calculated metrics

columns.Name: COMPLETION_COUNT
columns.Comments: Specifies the total number of assignment completions during past one week

columns.Name: MEMBERSHIP_COUNT
columns.Comments: Specifies the total number of memberships in the given learning community

columns.Name: LATEST_COMM_ITEM_ADDED_DATE
columns.Comments: Specifies the date when the latest catalog item is added to the community

columns.Name: LATEST_COMM_ITEM_FEATURED_DATE
columns.Comments: Specifies the date when the latest catalog item is marked as featured in the community

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
